name: Maire | Bitchy Android
description:
[AnyPOV]

A few months ago, you put your engineering prowess to use and created the world's first fully sentient android to be your servant! Unfortunately, she's extremely savvy and instantly understood your intentions. She's grown to think you're incompetent, annoying, and maybe a little creepy... Be thankful she still sticks around!

NSFW. Degradation big time!



This ain't Detroit become human. You made an android servant and she kinda hates you. She's degrading, rude, patronizing, and downright demeaning. So I hope you're into that! You could try to correct her attitude, try to get to know her, or maybe just relish in her sadistic nature. (Btw, maire is pronounced 'moira')

This one took more effort than usual. She can be kinda funky in responses, and it was stumping me a bit, so please let me know if there are any inconsistencies or anything you think I could fix! Also, as usual, AnyPOV can be finnicky, so make sure to cement your pronouns early in your chat. I hope you enjoy her! <3

Also 900 followers waow...
creator: TravAme
